title: Add proof-of-API integration test for ferrolearn-decomp
description: Final step of #246. tests/api_proof.rs exercising every public estimator in ferrolearn-decomp: PCA + IncrementalPCA + KernelPCA + SparsePCA, TruncatedSVD, NMF + MiniBatchNMF, FastICA, FactorAnalysis, DictionaryLearning, LatentDirichletAllocation, MDS + Isomap + LLE + SpectralEmbedding + TSNE + Umap, CCA + PLSRegression + PLSCanonical + PLSSVD, plus the 6 covariance estimators (EmpiricalCovariance, ShrunkCovariance, LedoitWolf, OAS, MinCovDet, EllipticEnvelope) that surprise-live in this crate.
